spec_match.rationale: Excellently illustrates four distinct layout and timing stagger patterns, but the rainbow chord background color HSL rule is corrupted.

interactive.rationale: Exceptional level of interactivity with live layout controls and instantly updated sibling animations.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Very clearly aligns with the performance benefits and layout flexibility enabled by tree-counting functions.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes custom support checks that cleanly detect tree-counting functions before staging animations.

references.rationale: Provides proper references to ChromeStatus and tree-counting specifications.

design_system.rationale: Fully matches repository styling guidelines and layouts.

openQuestions.title: Fix syntax-broken CSS background formula in rainbow chord
openQuestions.detail: Line 54 in stagger-orchestra/index.html contains a corrupted CSS background HSL formula (`var(--accent-blue) - 1) / var(--n)...`). Fix it to: `background: hsl(calc((var(--i) - 1) / var(--n) * 360deg), 70%, 45%);` to restore the beautiful dynamic rainbow chord staggering.

summary: A brilliant staggered animation showcase showcasing four distinct orchestrations under one roof. Although the dynamic count recalculations work flawlessly, a syntax error in active CSS (line 54) breaks the HSL rainbow color stagger.
